# Subscription plans and features

![](https://static.intercomassets.com/avatars/8087417/square_128/logo-1741092760.jpg)

Written by Help
Updated over 2 months ago

Table of contents

[Take App has two plans](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632347-subscription-plans-and-features#h_faa1a29676)[Business plan features](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632347-subscription-plans-and-features#h_8151d09d30)[Frequently Asked Questions](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632347-subscription-plans-and-features#h_17373b67ee)

## Take App has two plans

- Basic (free)

- Business ($50 per month)


You can get started with our **Basic plan** at no cost. You can upgrade to **Business** to unlock more advanced tools — like unlimited image uploads, CSV import/export, and WhatsApp integrations.

Check full pricing and compare features on our [Pricing Page](https://www.take.app/pricing).

# Business plan features

- Every feature in Basic plan, plus:

- [Unlimited images](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632181-unlimited-images-upload)

- [Custom Domain](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632154-custom-domain-existing-domain)

- [Credit card Payment](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632345-accept-credit-cards)

- [Payment proof upload](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632314-payment-proof-upload) & [Processing fee](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632337-payment-processing-fee)

- [Analytics](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632206-analytics), [SEO and Meta pixel](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632287-seo-and-trackings)

- [Invoice settings](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632312-add-company-information-in-invoice) and [PDF download](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632216-download-orders-as-pdf-files)

- [CSV export/import](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632422-bulk-product-upload-with-csv-file)

- [Customer reviews](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632158-customer-review)

- [Delivery fee by distance](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632372-delivery-fee-by-distance)

- [Upload images or files for buyer](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632103-upload-images-or-files-for-buyer)

- [Order export & product import](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632081-export-orders-in-csv)

- [Custom Pages](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632375-custom-pages)

- [Booking](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632234-booking)

- [Discount](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10923021-create-discount)

- [Instagram Business Integration](https://help.take.app/en/articles/12680256-instagram-business-integration)

- [Google Merchant Center](https://help.take.app/en/articles/12846855-google-merchant-center)


- [Remove Take App logo](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632419-removing-take-app-logo)

- [WhatsApp Business Platform](https://help.take.app/en/articles/11568325-what-is-whatsapp-business-integration)

- [WhatsApp Workflow](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632184-create-workflow)





  - [Custom Template Workflows](https://help.take.app/en/articles/11666463-custom-template-in-workflow)


- [Whatsapp Business Chat Inbox](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632210-whatsapp-business-chat-inbox)

- [WhatsApp Broadcast](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10987117-whatsapp-broadcast)

- [WhatsApp Inbox Automations](https://help.take.app/en/articles/11665310-whatsapp-inbox-automations-beta)

- [AI Chatbot](https://help.take.app/en/articles/11665310-chatbot-beta)

- Membership features:





  - [Membership login](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632144-membership-login-and-approval-end-user)

  - [Membership rewards](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632226-membership-loyalty-rewards)

  - [Membership exclusive access](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632242-membership-exclusive-access)

  - [Membership wholesale price](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632376-wholesale-price)


- [Multiple stores](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632224-create-multiple-stores)

- [Multiple staff accounts](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632168-invite-staff)

- [Webhooks](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632228-webhook)

- [Store clone tool](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632165-duplicate-stores)

- [Delivery tracking](https://delivery%20t/)

- [Limit payment method for delivery type](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632344-limit-payment-methods-for-delivery-type)

- [Store credit payment](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632381-store-credit-payment)

- Integrations with:





  - [Lalamove](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632152-lalamove-integration)

  - [Zapier](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632239-zapier)

  - [Shopify](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632267-shopify-integration)

  - [Shipday](https://help.take.app/en/articles/11622971-shipday-integration)


## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Can I try Take App for free?**

​ **A:** Yes! Our **Basic plan** is free and lets you start selling right away.

​

**Q: Can I cancel or change plans anytime?**

​ **A:** Yes, you can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your plan whenever you like.

​

**Q: How do I get started with a paid plan?**

​ **A:** Just go to your dashboard > Settings > Billing > Upgrade plan. Or you can follow [this guide.](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632222-upgrading-subscription-plan)

​

**Q: Do I need a credit card to use the Basic plan?**

​ **A:** Nope! The Basic plan is completely free — no payment info needed.

* * *

[Upgrading subscription plan](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632222-upgrading-subscription-plan) [Terminate/cancel my subscription plan](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632250-terminate-cancel-my-subscription-plan) [Subscription FAQ](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632286-subscription-faq) [How Workflow Quota works?](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632367-how-workflow-quota-works) [FAQ](https://help.take.app/en/articles/10632421-faq)

## FAQ

`Is Take App available in my country?`

`Yes. Take App works in 180+ countries and supports 10+ languages.`

`Will this reduce order mistakes on WhatsApp?`

`Yes. Customers review their orders on the checkout page before paying. Orders stay clear, complete, and saved in your dashboard.`

`Do I need a long-term contract?`

`No. You can start free and pay monthly. Yearly plans are optional and come with a discount.`

`Can I accept card payments from my customers?`

`Yes. Accept credit cards by integrating payment gateways. Take App never hold your money.`

`Can I use my own domain for my store?`

`Yes. Buy a domain through Take App or connect your existing one.`

`If I need help, how fast can I get support?`

`You get chat support in few hours. Paid plans include faster support and 1:1 video calls.`

## About Take App

![](https://www.91-cdn.com/saasworthy-cdn/saasworthy-new/public/images/web/clara-icn-blue.svg)Deep Dive with Clara AI

Take App offers a dynamic solution tailored for small businesses looking to create e-commerce stores optimized for WhatsApp. This user-friendly site builder empowers entrepreneurs to effortlessly design their online stores and seamlessly integrate them with WhatsApp, enhancing the order processing experience. With Take App, businesses can elevate customer engagement by providing a smooth shopping journey that merges the convenience of online browsing with the immediacy of messaging. The platform boasts an intuitive interface, making it accessible even for users with limited technical skills, allowing them to build and manage their stores with ease. Take App empowers small business owners to concentrate on their core strengths—developing exceptional products and connecting with their audience. The result is a powerful solution that drives growth and nurtures lasting customer relationships.
